title: Build LilyGO-style TUI shell and shared widgets
description: Why this exists: the visual identity needs to be implemented consistently across screens. What needs to be done: build the terminal app frame, compact status bar, device-like header/footer, signal/battery/GPS/BLE/IP indicators, tab or mode navigation, message cards/list rows, modal prompts, config rows, log rows, and diagnostics fields using the selected TUI framework. Acceptance criteria: widgets approximate the LilyGO reference within terminal constraints; layouts are stable at common terminal sizes; no screen depends on color alone; keyboard-only operation works; snapshot tests or recorded terminal renders cover core widgets.
